priorTitles: Blocked storm drain at Agara lake entrance
Accumulated debris in perimeter drainage network
Impaired stormwater outlet causing water stagnation
Risk of localized inundation due to clogged pipe
narrative: This is a recurring, chronic maintenance failure. Although reported twice within five months, both instances occur outside the monsoon season, indicating that the blockage is persistent rather than storm-driven. The lack of proactive clearing suggests a systemic neglect of urban drainage infrastructure, creating a latent flood risk that leaves surrounding areas vulnerable to sudden, heavy rainfall events.
